title: TIFR – Faculty Positions

basic_details.job_title: TIFR Faculty Positions Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: The Tata Institute of Fundamental Research (TIFR) Recruitment 2026 for posts of Faculty Positions. Candidates with M.Phil/Ph.D Can Apply Offline. The Offline application opens on 01-01-2026, and closes on 30-06-2026. The candidate shall apply Offline through TIFR website, tifr.res.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. from a recognised institution and an outstanding research career as per international standards

how_to_apply: The applications must be submitted “directly to the Heads of individual Departments / Schools / Centres listed at the end of the Advertisement.”
Interested candidates are requested to visit the concerned faculty page by clicking the hyperlink(s) below for more details.
seo_tags: Tata Institute of Fundamental Research Faculty Positions Recruitment 2026
